attributes.name: confirm
attributes.description: Confirmation message; enables a confirmation modal.

attributes.name: confirm-id
attributes.description: Identifier of the associated confirmation modal (generated when `confirm` is set).

attributes.name: confirm-title
attributes.description: Title of the confirmation modal.

attributes.name: confirm-variant
attributes.description: Color variant of the confirmation button inside the modal.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Render the button as disabled.

attributes.name: end-content
attributes.description: Raw HTML content inserted after the text.

attributes.name: end-icon
attributes.description: Icon displayed after the text.

attributes.name: form-id
attributes.description: Target form identifier (`form` attribute).

attributes.name: hide
attributes.description: Force-hide the button (takes precedence over `show`).

attributes.name: hide-text
attributes.description: Hide the button text (render icons only).

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Single icon (backward-compatible alias of `startIcon`).

attributes.name: lg
attributes.description: Shortcut for `size="lg"`.

attributes.name: no-outline
attributes.description: Disable the outline style even when `all_buttons_outline` is enabled.

attributes.name: outline
attributes.description: Force the outline style of the button (Bootstrap 5).

attributes.name: show
attributes.description: Display the button. Defaults to `true`.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Button size. `null` means the default size.

attributes.name: sm
attributes.description: Shortcut for `size="sm"`.

attributes.description: Disable the outline style even when `all_buttons_outline` is enabled.

attributes.name: novalidate
attributes.description: Add the `novalidate` attribute to the form. Defaults to `true`.

attributes.name: outline
attributes.description: Force the outline style of the button (Bootstrap 5).

attributes.name: show
attributes.description: Display the button. Defaults to `true`.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Button size. `null` means the default size.

attributes.name: sm
attributes.description: Shortcut for `size="sm"`.

attributes.name: start-content
attributes.description: Raw HTML content inserted before the text.

attributes.name: start-icon
attributes.description: Icon displayed before the text.

attributes.name: text
attributes.description: Button label (raw HTML allowed).

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Button `title` attribute (raw HTML allowed).

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: HTML button type. Defaults to `submit`.

attributes.name: url
attributes.description: Target URL of the form (`action` attribute). (required)

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Bootstrap color variant of the button. Defaults to `primary`.

attributes.name: confirm
attributes.description: Confirmation message; enables a confirmation modal.

attributes.name: confirm-id
attributes.description: Identifier of the associated confirmation modal (generated when `confirm` is set).

attributes.name: confirm-title
attributes.description: Title of the confirmation modal.

attributes.name: confirm-variant
attributes.description: Color variant of the confirmation button inside the modal.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Render the button as disabled.

attributes.name: end-content
attributes.description: Raw HTML content inserted after the text.

attributes.name: end-icon
attributes.description: Icon displayed after the text.

attributes.name: form-id
attributes.description: Identifier of the generated form that wraps the button.

attributes.name: hide
attributes.description: Force-hide the button (takes precedence over `show`).

attributes.name: hide-text
attributes.description: Hide the button text (render icons only).

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Single icon (backward-compatible alias of `startIcon`).

attributes.name: lg
attributes.description: Shortcut for `size="lg"`.

attributes.name: confirm-variant
attributes.description: Color variant of the confirmation button inside the modal.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Render the button as disabled.

attributes.name: end-content
attributes.description: Raw HTML content inserted after the text.

attributes.name: end-icon
attributes.description: Icon displayed after the text.

attributes.name: hide
attributes.description: Force-hide the button (takes precedence over `show`).

attributes.name: hide-text
attributes.description: Hide the button text (render icons only).

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Single icon (backward-compatible alias of `startIcon`).

attributes.name: lg
attributes.description: Shortcut for `size="lg"`.

attributes.name: no-outline
attributes.description: Disable the outline style even when `all_buttons_outline` is enabled.

attributes.name: outline
attributes.description: Force the outline style of the button (Bootstrap 5).

attributes.name: show
attributes.description: Display the button. Defaults to `true`.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Button size. `null` means the default size.

attributes.name: sm
attributes.description: Shortcut for `size="sm"`.

attributes.name: text
attributes.description: Button label (raw HTML allowed).

attributes.name: dismissible
attributes.description: Add a dismiss (close) button to the alert.

attributes.name: hide
attributes.description: Force-hide the alert (takes precedence over `show`).

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Icon displayed in the alert (format defined by `alert_icon_format`).

attributes.name: show
attributes.description: Display the alert. Defaults to `true`.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Title displayed at the top of the alert.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Bootstrap color variant of the alert. `null` means no variant applied.

attributes.name: hide
attributes.description: Force-hide the badge (takes precedence over `show`).

attributes.name: pill
attributes.description: Pill style (rounded corners).

attributes.name: show
attributes.description: Display the badge. Defaults to `true`.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Bootstrap color variant of the badge. Defaults to `primary`.

attributes.name: action
attributes.description: Target URL of the form (`action` attribute). (required)

attributes.name: has-files
attributes.description: The form accepts file uploads (`enctype=multipart/form-data`).

attributes.name: method
attributes.description: HTTP method. Defaults to `POST` (method spoofing for PUT/PATCH/DELETE).

attributes.name: novalidate
attributes.description: Add `novalidate`. `null` falls back to the `all_forms_with_novalidate` config.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: Label `for` attribute (id of the associated field). (required)

attributes.name: bag
attributes.description: Name of the error bag to use. Defaults to `default`.

attributes.name: field
attributes.description: Name of the field whose validation errors are displayed. (required)

attributes.name: error-bag
attributes.description: Name of the validation error bag to use.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: `id` attribute. Defaults to the `name` value.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Field `name` attribute (also the default `id`). (required)

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: HTML input type. Defaults to `text`.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Initial value (overridden by `old($name)` if present).

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: (required)

attributes.name: error-bag
attributes.description: Name of the validation error bag to use.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: `id` attribute of the textarea. Defaults to the `name` value.

attributes.name: name

attributes.description: Name of the validation error bag to use.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: `id` attribute. Defaults to the `name` value.

attributes.name: label-attribute
attributes.description: Attribute used as the option label. Defaults to `name`.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Field `name` attribute (also the default `id`). (required)

attributes.name: options
attributes.description: Options to render; nested arrays/collections become optgroups.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Optional placeholder option shown first.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Currently selected value(s) (overridden by `old($name)` when present).

attributes.name: value-attribute
attributes.description: Attribute used as the option value. Defaults to `id`.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Initial checked state (overridden by `old($name)` when present).

attributes.name: error-bag
attributes.description: Name of the validation error bag to use.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: `id` attribute. Defaults to the `name` value.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label text displayed next to the checkbox. (required)

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Field `name` attribute (also the default `id`). (required)

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value submitted when the checkbox is checked. Defaults to `1`.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Initial selected value or boolean (overridden by `old($name)` when present).

attributes.name: error-bag
attributes.description: Name of the validation error bag to use.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: `id` attribute. Defaults to `{name}-{value}`.

attributes.description: Label text displayed next to the radio. (required)

attributes.name: name
